items.speaker: Hanolt
items.text: Hey, you're the one who said that to the face of a student. Are you going to tell {Male=him;Female=her} how you dragged that clueless Roya over, who had no understanding of the rules whatsoever?

items.speaker: Hanolt
items.text: And how that very Roya mastered the rules only after one round and stomped you in every game afterwards? Haha!

items.speaker: Stylios
items.text: Argh! Shut up! Just shut up!
